title: Kaya ve Minnoş

sidekick.name: Minnoş
sidekick.description: a soft gray long-haired cat (like a persian/ragdoll mix), silver-gray fluffy coat with a lighter cream chest, big bright green eyes, pink nose, small ears with tufts, gentle expressive face, fluffy plume-like tail. Always the SAME gray long-haired cat — never short-haired, never orange, never tabby-striped.

description: Kaya için Minnoş sadece bir kedi değildi... patileri yumuşak, gözleri ışıl ışıl, en iyi dostuydu. Onunla uyumayı, onunla oyun oynamayı öğrendi. İşte Kaya'nın ilk arkadaşlık masalı.
style: Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

characterDescription.base: Turkish child. Exact face, hair, skin tone, and accessories come from the character-profile reference photo. No hardcoded physical traits — the reference photo is the sole source of truth for identity.

scenes.title: Sabahın Işıltısı
scenes.text: Kaya, yatağında uyanır. Güneş, pencereden içeri süzülür.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC A young boy, Kaya, 2 years old, wakes up in his bed, sunlight streaming through the window., setting: Kaya'nın odası, sabah, mood: dreamy, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Yumuşacık Mırıldanma
scenes.text: Minnoş, Kaya'nın yatağına atlar. Yumuşacık tüyleri, Kaya'nın eline değer.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Minnoş, a fluffy cat, jumps onto Kaya's bed, brushing her soft fur against Kaya's hand., setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: warm, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Küçük Bir Sır
scenes.text: Kaya, Minnoş'un kulaklarına fısıldamak ister. Küçük bir sırrı vardır.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Kaya leans in close to Minnoş, wanting to whisper a secret into her ear., setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: curious, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Minnoş'un Cevabı
scenes.text: Minnoş, başını Kaya'nın koluna koyar. Mırıl mırıl sesler çıkarır.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Minnoş rests her head on Kaya's arm, purring softly., setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: warm, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Sıcak Bir Duygu
scenes.text: Kaya, Minnoş'un sıcaklığını hisseder. Kalbi pır pır çarpar.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Kaya feels Minnoş's warmth, his heart fluttered with happiness., setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: joyful, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: En İyi Dostum
scenes.text: Kaya, Minnoş'un kulağına eğilir. "Sen benim en iyi dostumsun," diye fısıldar.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Kaya leans towards Minnoş's ear and whispers, "You are my best friend.", setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: warm, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Gözler Kapanır
scenes.text: Minnoş, gözlerini kapatır. Sanki Kaya'nın sözlerini dinler.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Minnoş closes her eyes, as if listening intently to Kaya's words., setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: reflective, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Sımsıcak Bir Kalp
scenes.text: Kaya'nın kalbi sımsıcaktır. Onu çok sever.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Kaya's heart feels warm, full of love for Minnoş., setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: warm, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Sakin Bir Huzur
scenes.text: İkisi de sessizce uzanır. Odaya, huzurlu bir hava dolar.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Both Kaya and Minnoş lie quietly, the room filled with a peaceful atmosphere., setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: dreamy, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Tatlı Rüyalar
scenes.text: Kaya, Minnoş ile uykuya dalar. Tatlı rüyalar görürler.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Kaya falls asleep with Minnoş, dreaming sweet dreams together., setting: Kaya'nın odası, yatakta, mood: warm, medium-close shot, character and cat 50-60% of frame, focus on emotional connection, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🐱
facts: Kediler, insanlarla iletişim kurmak için mırıldanırlar. Bu, onların mutlu ve güvende hissettiklerini gösterir.
Bir kedinin burun izi, tıpkı insan parmak izi gibi tektir. Her kedinin kendine özgü bir burun deseni vardır.
Kedilerin bıyıkları, karanlıkta yönlerini bulmalarına ve etraflarındaki cisimleri hissetmelerine yardımcı olur.

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? ✨
facts: Dostluk, kalbimizi ısıtan harika bir duygudur. Dostlarımızla güzel anılar biriktiririz.
Evcil hayvanlar, bizim en iyi dostlarımızdan olabilirler. Onlara sevgi ve şefkat göstermek çok önemlidir.
Fısıldamak, bazen çok özel ve gizli şeyleri paylaşmanın tatlı bir yoludur.

specialPagePrompts.heroPage: A beautiful premium children's storybook HERO PAGE in 2:3 portrait — themed decorative background matching "Kaya ve Minnoş'un Fısıltıları". ABSOLUTELY NO CHILD CHARACTER, NO PEOPLE, NO HUMAN FIGURES anywhere on the page. Themed environment: Kaya's cozy bedroom, morning light. Kaya in pajamas, Minnoş curled up beside him. Soft blankets and a warm atmosphere.. TITLE (display EXACTLY as Turkish text, top 20% of the page): "Hikayemizin Kahramanı Kaya" Typography: large playful HAND-LETTERED decorative title with rainbow/multi-color warm palette, sparkles and floating decorative elements around letters, drop shadow, cheerful children's book cover-level fun. Each word a slightly different warm color (gold, coral, rose, turquoise), letters may have tiny ornaments (stars, hearts, leaves). LAYOUT: title top 20%, LEAVE THE CENTER ~55% OF THE PAGE VISUALLY CALM (soft gradient or soft bokeh, no busy elements, no text, no objects) so a rectangular photo frame can be composited on top later. Bottom 25% may have tasteful themed decorative ornaments, flowers, sparkles, a ribbon. Turkish characters (ş ç ğ ü ö ı İ) MUST be perfect. No other text on page besides the title. Pixar 3D CGI animation style 3D CGI / painterly storybook illustration blend, ultra high detail, magazine-cover polish.
specialPagePrompts.funFactBg: A warm decorative themed background with sparkles and soft glow, NO TEXT NO LETTERS, 3D CGI illustration.
specialPagePrompts.senderNoteBg: A cozy warm background with soft golden light, NO TEXT NO LETTERS, 3D CGI render.
specialPagePrompts.backCover: A warm artistic closing scene matching "Kaya ve Minnoş'un Fısıltıları". Kaya ve Minnoş'un sıcacık dostluğunu keşfedin. Minnoş'un mırıldanmaları, Kaya'nın fısıltılarıyla buluşur, kalpleri sevgiyle dolar. Minik okurlar için nazik bir başlangıç.. NO TEXT NO LETTERS in image, 3D CGI render.
